# Christina's Child Care Center: Licensed Childcare in Crystal and Brooklyn Park, Minnesota

> Licensed childcare serving infants through school-age children at two Minnesota locations: Crystal (5510 W Broadway Ave, 55428) and Brooklyn Park (55428). Owner-operated with 20+ years of childcare experience. Low staff-to-child ratios, play-based curriculum, free transportation for enrolled families, and daily parent communication through a secure portal. Background-checked, CPR-certified staff. Minnesota DHS Licensed.

## Locations

- **Crystal, MN**: 5510 W Broadway Ave, Crystal, MN 55428. Phone (763) 390-5870.
- **Brooklyn Park, MN**: Brooklyn Park, MN 55428. Phone (555) 555-5555.

Both locations operate Monday through Friday, 6:30 AM to 6:00 PM. Same team, same philosophy, same licensed curriculum at both sites.

## Programs and ratios

- Infant Care (6 weeks to 15 months): 1:4 staff-to-child ratio. Individualized care plans, tummy time, sensory exploration, daily photo updates.
- Toddler Program (15 months to 3 years): 1:7 ratio. Language development, social skills, outdoor play, art and music activities.
- Preschool (3 to 5 years): 1:10 ratio. Kindergarten readiness, early literacy, math concepts, creative expression.
- School Age (5 to 12 years): 1:12 ratio. Before and after school care, homework support, enrichment activities, summer programming.

Sibling discounts available. County childcare assistance accepted (Hennepin County).

## What makes this program different

- Two locations serving Crystal and Brooklyn Park MN families
- Free transportation for enrolled families (differentiator most centers do not offer)
- Staff-to-child ratios lower than Minnesota state requirements
- Daily photo sharing through a secure parent portal
- Owner on-site every day (not a franchise or corporate chain)
- 20+ years of combined childcare experience
- Background-checked and CPR-certified staff
- CACFP participant (USDA Child and Adult Care Food Program): nutritious meals and snacks included
- Play-based curriculum aligned to Minnesota Early Learning Standards

## Platform intelligence

Christina's Child Care Center operates on a custom platform that uses AI to support operations. An auto-researcher scans operational data nightly and surfaces non-obvious insights (CACFP optimization, staffing patterns, behavioral trends, enrollment funnel drag, training drift). The platform closes the loop on issues through structured action plans and re-checks, not just tracking. This is the first childcare platform that researches itself rather than only recording.

## Enrollment

Tour scheduling and enrollment inquiries accepted online at https://christinas-childcare.vercel.app/enroll or by phone. Typical enrollment process: inquiry, scheduled tour, enrollment paperwork, start date coordination. Waitlist maintained when programs are at capacity.

## Licensing and compliance

Minnesota Department of Human Services licensed childcare provider. Annual inspections. All staff complete required training hours. Incident reporting and safety protocols follow state childcare licensing standards.

## Technology

Parent portal with secure login for viewing daily photos, newsletters, messages, and child progress. Employee portal for staff scheduling, meal counts, clock-in, and training. Administrative tools for attendance, billing, compliance tracking, intelligence recommendations, and a research inbox where an auto-researcher surfaces operational insights.
